name: Korat retail and civic band
notes: Built-up city-center band around government offices, hospitals, rail access, and central-city retail where destination charging should carry weight.

name: Mittraphap modern retail spine
notes: Modern retail strip linking The Mall, Terminal 21, hotels, and arterial city access on the Mittraphap side of Korat.

name: Route 304 south growth axis
notes: Southbound growth axis connecting Suranaree University, hospital-side activity, and Route 304 corridor demand.

name: Save One and south-west service band
notes: Market, bus-terminal, and hospital-side service cluster with strong local repeat trips and evening demand.

name: Pak Chong Mittraphap gateway
notes: Peri-urban gateway band for Mittraphap corridor demand, tourism spillover, and service-town charging in Pak Chong.
